steps.t: Elrond is in his library in the Last Homely House, in Rivendell. Bingo has gone in search of food for himself and W.W., and left you the task of telli…
Elrond suggested that you introduce Bingo Boffin to Bilbo Baggins in the Hall of Fire.
Bingo Boffin is in the Hall of Fire, merrily conversing with Bilbo Baggins.
Bilbo Baggins is in the Hall of Fire, in the Last Homely House.
Bilbo has provided you and Bingo with a map of notable landmarks in Rivendell.
You and Bingo have explored several of the most notable sights in Rivendell, and should now return to the Hall of Fire, in the Last Homely House.
Bilbo is in the Hall of Fire, in the Last Homely House. Bingo has noticed that the map of Rivendell sketched by Bilbo bears some resemblance to the ma…
Bingo is in the Hall of Fire, in the Last Homely House. You have learned that Bilbo Baggins is responsible for drawing the map that was left in the co…
